name: Payroll UX - Late and Overtime Fields Visibility
description: Verify that late minutes (Late min) and overtime hours (OT hrs) input fields are clearly visible and labeled in the payroll day editor

planSteps.description: Open the ShiftPro app and navigate to the Payroll section by clicking the Payroll navigation button at the bottom
Verify the Payroll section loads with month navigation bar showing the current month title with previous and next arrow buttons
Verify the Daily History card is visible and contains a list or grid of date entries with day status controls
Verify each day entry row has a 'Late min' numeric input field or column that is clearly labeled and visible
Verify each day entry row has an 'OT hrs' numeric input field or column that is clearly labeled and visible
Verify the daily history table has a 'Note' field or column for each day entry
Verify the payroll summary card shows Net Salary, Total Allowances, Total Deductions, Late Penalties, Overtime Pay, and Vacation Balance
Verify the Monthly Allowances section is visible below the day editor with allowance items and an Add Allowance button
Click the next month button in the month navigation bar
Verify the month title updates to the next month
Click the previous month button twice and verify the title updates to the previous month
Verify the month navigation allows selecting the correct payroll period
